handoff_flow.name: CSV becomes a cataloged asset
handoff_flow.detail: The messy business request sample is anchored to a DataHub dataset URN.

handoff_flow.name: MetadataChangeProposal payloads are prepared
handoff_flow.detail: datasetProperties, schemaMetadata, ownership, and glossaryTerms are generated in dry-run mode.

handoff_flow.name: Local DataHub posting is opt-in
handoff_flow.detail: The same payloads can be posted only to a local GMS with the explicit --post command.

handoff_flow.name: MCP-style context reads happen before action
handoff_flow.detail: The agent reads entity, lineage, and CAT context packet data before surfacing decisions.

handoff_flow.name: Policy gates decide what is safe
handoff_flow.detail: Known owner/contact context permits internal queueing; missing contact context blocks external outreach.

handoff_flow.name: Receipt write is bounded
handoff_flow.detail: CAT writes a receipt with no external side effects instead of performing outreach.

tool_calls.name: datahub.get_entity
tool_calls.purpose: Fetch the DataHub dataset identity and metadata aspects before the agent reasons about work.

tool_calls.name: datahub.get_lineage
tool_calls.purpose: Confirm the source-to-agent path so receipts cite the right upstream asset.

tool_calls.name: cat.get_agent_context_packet
tool_calls.purpose: Transform DataHub-derived context into CAT's action-safety contract.

tool_calls.name: cat.write_receipt
tool_calls.purpose: Persist the safe, approval-required, or blocked outcome after context has been read.

request_outcomes.receipt_side_effect: local receipt only; no external outreach or payment action
local receipt only; no external outreach or payment action
local receipt only; no external outreach or payment action

local_to_live_boundary.remote_or_production_posting: blocked unless the operator intentionally changes DATAHUB_GMS_URL
local_to_live_boundary.external_side_effects: none in dry-run evidence; optional local DataHub metadata write only
